content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.nih.gov/news-events/nih-research-matters/time-restricted-eating-metabolic-syndrome", "source_title": "Time-restricted eating for metabolic syndrome - NIH", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "In recent years, there’s been a growing interest in an eating pattern called time-restricted eating, or intermittent fasting.", "direct_quote": "In recent years, there’s been a growing interest in an eating pattern called time-restricted eating, or intermittent fasting.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Several animal and clinical studies have found evidence that this approach can lead to metabolic improvements, including weight loss and...", "direct_quote": "Several animal and clinical studies have found evidence that this approach can lead to metabolic improvements, including weight loss and better control of blood glucose, or blood sugar.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Many previous trials of time-restricted eating focused on people with obesity but no other identified metabolic conditions.", "direct_quote": "Many previous trials of time-restricted eating focused on people with obesity but no other identified metabolic conditions.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts from Time-restricted eating for metabolic syndrome - NIH."}]}
